---
title: "GLEAM differential analysis"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM differential analysis}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
res_cell <- test_pathway(sc, group = "group", level = "cell")
res_pb <- test_pathway(sc, group = "group", sample = "sample", level = "pseudobulk")
res_wct <- compare_groups_within_celltype(sc, group = "group", celltype = "celltype", target_celltype = "CD8_T")
```
